title: Buraidah、Al Qassim — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: Buraidah、Al Qassim的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

Buraidah是Al Qassim的一個城市，人口約610,000。The capital of Al Qassim Province, a major agricultural center known for date production in central Saudi Arabia.

Last updated: July 23, 2026
